description: GrantFlow is a DAO treasury management protocol that enables sybil-resistant grant distribution through zero-knowledge proofs. Unlike traditional quadratic voting which requires on-chain identity tracking or KYC, GrantFlow allows voters to prove they hold a valid Soulbound Token (SBT) or NFT without revealing their specific identity. The system utilizes a Circom circuit to generate a proof of unique eligibility, which is verified on-chain by a lightweight Solidity verifier. Funds are held in an
angle: Enables sybil-resistant treasury grants via zero-knowledge proofs of unique identity without compromising voter privacy or requiring KYC.
